description_long: This is a small, weathered gas station set in a dusty, desert-like environment, surrounded by a wooden fence and large rocks. The main building is rectangular with a flat roof, faded yellow and brown walls, and a boarded-up window, suggesting abandonment or disrepair. A single, rusted canopy with two supporting columns covers the fueling area, which features one visible vintage-style fuel pump. The ground is bare earth, with scattered debris and a large, hand-painted sign near the entrance displaying fuel prices. There is graffiti on the side of the building, and a metal shed or garage door is attached to the rear. The overall appearance is aged, utilitarian, and evocative of a remote roadside stop.
description: A small, weathered gas station with a faded building, rusted canopy, vintage fuel pump, and hand-painted signage in a dusty, fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main building, canopy, fuel pump, large sign, and fenced lot with rocks.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the canopy's structure, fuel pump beneath, and the side of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a metal garage door, side shed, and the back of the canopy with supporting columns.
description_view_3: Side view displays graffiti, the shed, and the fence line, with less visibility of the fueling area.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage-style fuel pump under the canopy, colored red and white, with a hose and nozzle attached. No digital displays or branding are visible.
attribute_canopy_structure: A single, rectangular, flat-roofed canopy covers the fueling area, supported by two metal columns. The canopy is rusted red with a weathered appearance and no visible lighting or signage.
attribute_station_signage: A large, hand-painted sign near the entrance displays 'GAS' and other text, mounted on a wooden post. There is also graffiti on the side of the building. No main brand or digital signage is visible.
attribute_price_display_board: A hand-painted price display board is attached to the main sign near the entrance, showing fuel prices in a manual format. No digital or electronic price boards are visible.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: The entrance to the convenience store is located at the front of the main building, featuring a single manual door with a small overhang. No automatic doors or prominent branding are visible above the entrance.
